title: Last-Minute DIY Valentine’s Day Card Ideas
excerpt: Valentine’s Day is just around the corner! Do you need a last-minute Valentine’s Day card idea? Here are three easy DIY Valentine’s Day cards that you can whip up with scrapbooking supplies from your stash! These Valentine’s Day DIYs are…
body:
Valentine’s Day is just around the corner! Do you need a last-minute Valentine’s Day card idea? Here are three easy DIY Valentine’s Day cards that you can whip up with scrapbooking supplies from your stash! These Valentine’s Day DIYs are simple enough to make with your kids.

These super simple Valentine's Day cards take just a few supplies to complete -  manila tags, washi tape and a couple of stamps. Feel free to add more embellishments and write a personalized message on the back. 

I created a whole bunch of easy Valentine’s Day cards using one of my favorite scrapbooking supplies - washi tape! I especially love the “From Cali With Love” cut out card that you can customize with the state of your choice! Watch the video above to see how I made these easy washi tape cards for Valentine’s Day!

Any Frozen fans out there? These Frozen-Inspired Origami Heart Cards﻿ make the perfect Valentine’s Day Cards using non-traditional colors. Check out this blogpost for an easy step-by-step tutorial and a Free Printable to make your very own Frozen-Inspired Valentine’s Day Cards!

Which last-minute Valentine’s Day card idea was your favorite? Let me know in the comments below!

And if you enjoyed this post, don’t forget to pin it on Pinterest!
